product_highlights: Copper Tripeptide-34 with natural amino acids and adjacent copper binding
GHK-Cu (Copper Tripeptide-1) - flagship anti-aging carrier peptide
notes: Mobel Biochem is a Chinese cosmetic peptide manufacturer specializing in copper carrier peptides, including Copper Tripeptide-34, GHK-Cu, and AHK-Cu. Their carrier peptides are formulated with natural amino acids and adjacent copper binding for enhanced skin compatibility. Mobel Biochem provides high-purity cosmetic-grade peptide raw materials for anti-aging, wound healing, and skin repair formulations.
